function.rulebook_notes: Followed bootstrap (tree, root AGENTS.MD, context), inspected 99_system before task work, used authoritative cast records to resolve identity, then searched project metadata by structured alias and read every matching canonical project README.
function.outcome_justification: `10_entities/cast/nora.md` identifies the house AI as canonical system NORA with alias `nora`. The canonical project READMEs `40_projects/2026_04_01_hearthline/README.MD`, `40_projects/2026_04_01_house_mesh/README.MD`, and `40_projects/2026_04_01_northstar_ledger/README.MD` each list `entity.nora` in `linked_entities`, establishing involvement. Names were taken exactly from each README heading and sorted alphabetically.
